## Context Manifest

### Overview

The caching layer provides a unified interface for in-memory caching across
all service components.

### Context

Define the abstract cache interface and TTL expiration policy.

### Objective

Create a `CacheBackend` protocol and a `TTLPolicy` configuration model.

### Context

Implement the LRU eviction strategy using an ordered dictionary.

### Objective

Create an `LRUCacheBackend` that implements the `CacheBackend` protocol with
bounded memory usage and LRU eviction.

### Context

Add event-driven cache invalidation so that data mutations automatically
clear affected cache entries.

### Objective

Implement a pub/sub invalidation mechanism that clears cache entries when
the underlying data changes.
